title: Everbuild – One Strike – Multi-Purpose Quick-Drying Filler – One-Time Application – White – 1 Litre Tub
features: OVER PAINTABLE – Can be painted and papered over once dried. Can be ready to paint or wallpaper in just 30 minutes.
NON-SAG – Lightweight filler prevents sagging even on ceilings and walls.
VERSATILE – Can be used for both interior and exterior use on a variety of substrates including plaster, brick, stone, wood and render.
EASY TO USE – Easy to use straight from the tub with a spatula or spreader for seamless application. Applies and finishes to a smooth surface with no sanding or mixing needed.
QUICK-DRYING – Filler dries to a smooth finish in 30 minutes depending on application. Dries brilliant white.
GREAT COVERAGE – Fills gaps and holes to a depth of 75mm in one application and up to a maximum width of 50mm.
AVAILABLE IN MULTIPLE SIZES – Available in 250ml, 1 Litre, 2.5 Litre and 5 Litre tubs as well as a 300ml cartridge.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? Clean the surface so that it is clean and dry, without traces of paint or glue. Fill the hole or cavity using a painter's knife. Smooth the surface using a putty knife or smoother and let dry. Drying time 30 minutes at +20 °C 50 % R.H.
